name: 13.25" Pre-lit Angel Christmas Tree Topper Gold/White - Wondershop™
description:
Illuminate your tree with the divine touch of this 13.25-Inch Pre-Lit Angel Christmas Tree Topper from Wondershop™. Crafted from ABS plastic, this stunning topper features an angel design with folded hands in white and gold and is fitted with pre-lit bulbs for a warm glow. Intended for indoor use only, it adds graceful radiance when attached to a tree in your entryway or living room.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
